instanceSettings.general.description: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
instanceSettings.general.localTrustedMod: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
instanceSettings.general.authenticatedPu: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
instanceSettings.general.authenticatedPr: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
instanceSettings.general.censorUsernameD: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instanceSettings.general.keyboardShortcu: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating tasks or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instanceSettings.general.backupRetention: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
instanceSettings.general.aiFeedbackDesc: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instanceSettings.general.noDefaultSaved: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
instanceSettings.general.dontAllowDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
instanceSettings.general.retestPrompt: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the
instanceSettings.general.retestPromptEnd: JSON row for this instance, or set it back to
instanceSettings.general.retestPromptBot: both mean no default has been chosen yet.
instanceSettings.general.signOutDesc: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
instanceSettings.heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
instanceSettings.heartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instanceSettings.heartbeats.disableAllCo: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled {{noun}}?
instanceSettings.heartbeats.noHeartbeats: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
instanceSettings.heartbeats.failedToDisa: Failed to disable {{failures}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}
instanceSettings.experimental.title: Experimental
instanceSettings.experimental.descriptio: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instanceSettings.experimental.warningTit: Experimental features may break at any time.
instanceSettings.experimental.warningDes: These features are opt-in and come with no compatibility guarantees. They may change, break, or be removed without notice. Avoid relying on them for critical or production workflows.
instanceSettings.experimental.enableEnvi: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
instanceSettings.experimental.experiment: Show task detail controls for browsing and previewing workspace files relative to a task.
instanceSettings.experimental.enableIsol: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing task runs.
instanceSettings.experimental.streamline: Reduces the maximum number of items in the left navigation bar — nests Projects under Work with a dedicated Projects page, and shows only active agents (max 5 recently-active) in the sidebar.
instanceSettings.experimental.toggleStre: Toggle streamlined left navigation experimental setting
instanceSettings.experimental.conference: Adds a Conference Room — one chat where you and your whole team work together — plus the live activity feed and the redesigned onboarding. Also restyles task threads as chat bubbles. Turn off anytime to restore the classic UI.
instanceSettings.experimental.toggleConf: Toggle conference room chat experimental setting
instanceSettings.experimental.taskPlanDe: Show accepted-plan decomposition history on task detail pages. Intended for debugging and validating subtask creation behavior while the presentation is still being refined.
instanceSettings.experimental.toggleTask: Toggle task plan decomposition panel experimental setting
instanceSettings.experimental.taskWatchd: Show task detail controls for configuring watchdog agents that verify stopped task subtrees and restore live paths when work should continue.
instanceSettings.experimental.cloudSyncD: Show local Paperclip Cloud upstream connection, preview, push, retry, and activation review surfaces. Saved connections and run history are preserved when this is disabled.
instanceSettings.experimental.autoRestar: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
instanceSettings.experimental.autoCreate: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery tasks for task dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.
instanceSettings.experimental.lookbackEr: Lookback hours must be a whole number from 1 to 720.
instanceSettings.experimental.noRecovery: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery can still run for future liveness incidents in this window.
instanceSettings.experimental.skippedOut: {{count}} current {{unit}} outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.
instanceSettings.profile.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
instanceSettings.profile.selectCompanyFo: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.
instanceSettings.profile.clickToUpload: Click the avatar to upload a new image.
instanceSettings.profile.storedInCompany: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{name}}.
instanceSettings.profile.selectCompanyTo: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.
instanceSettings.profile.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
instanceSettings.profile.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.

executionWorkspace.close.checkingSafeToC: Checking whether this workspace is safe to close...
executionWorkspace.close.failedToInspect: Failed to inspect workspace close readiness.
executionWorkspace.close.sharedWorkspace: This is a shared workspace session. Archiving it removes this session record but keeps the underlying project workspace.

executionWorkspace.close.projectPrimaryD: This execution workspace currently points at the project's primary workspace path.
executionWorkspace.close.disposableDescr: This workspace is disposable and can be archived.
executionWorkspace.close.cleanupPrevious: Cleanup previously failed on this workspace. Retrying close will rerun the cleanup flow and update the workspace status if it succeeds.

issue.runLedger.watchdog.couldNotRecord: Paperclip could not record the watchdog decision.
issue.runLedger.liveness.advancedDesc: Run produced concrete evidence of progress.
issue.runLedger.liveness.planOnlyDesc: Run described future work without concrete action evidence.

issue.chat.feedbackSharingDescription: Choose whether voted AI outputs can be shared with Paperclip Labs. This answer becomes the default for future thumbs up and thumbs down votes.
issue.chat.voteAlwaysSaved: This vote is always saved locally.
issue.chat.chooseAlwaysAllow: Choose Always allow to share this vote and future voted AI outputs. Choose Don't allow to keep this vote and future votes local.
issue.chat.changeInSettings: You can change this later in Instance Settings > General.
issue.chat.pausedByBudget: It was paused by a budget hard stop.
issue.chat.pausedBySystem: It was paused by the system.
issue.chat.assigneePaused: {{agent}} is paused. New runs will not start until the agent is resumed. {{detail}}
issue.recovery.unassignedPickOne: unassigned — pick one to wake them
issue.recovery.observingWithoutInterrupt: Recovery is observing without interrupting the live run.
issue.recovery.staysOpenUntilDecision: The card stays open until an explicit decision is recorded.
issue.recovery.headlines.missingDisposit: This task's run finished, but no next step was chosen.
issue.recovery.headlines.strandedTask: Paperclip retried this task's last run and it still has no live execution path.
issue.recovery.headlines.workspaceValida: Paperclip stopped this run because the task's git workspace could not be validated.
issue.recovery.headlines.configurationVa: Paperclip stopped before dispatching this run because required secret/env bindings are missing.
issue.recovery.headlines.activeWatchdog: The active run has been silent. Recovery is observing without interrupting it.
issue.recovery.headlines.graphLiveness: Paperclip detected this task lost a live action path. A recovery owner needs to act.
issue.recovery.resolveOptions.tryAgainDe: Dismiss recovery and return the source task to todo.
issue.recovery.resolveOptions.markDoneDe: Restore by recording the requested work as complete.
issue.recovery.resolveOptions.sendForRev: Hand off to a reviewer with a real review path.
issue.recovery.resolveOptions.falsePosit: Dismiss recovery and mark the source task complete.
Dismiss recovery and send the source task for review.

issue.newDialog.failedToCreate: Failed to create task. Try again.
issue.newDialog.backlogDescription: Parked — assignee will not be woken
issue.newDialog.assignedBacklogNote: Assigning implies executable intent — leave status as Backlog only to deliberately park this. The assignee will not be woken until status moves to Todo or In Progress.
issue.newDialog.lowTrustNote: Low-trust review agent. It can only act inside its assigned review boundary; issue, project, or run policy defines the concrete scope.

issue.blockedByParkedWorkTitle: Blocked by parked work — at least one assigned blocker is in backlog and will not wake its assignee.
issue.treeControl.pauseSubtreeHelp: Pause active execution in this task subtree until an explicit resume.
issue.treeControl.resumeSubtreeHelp: Release the active subtree pause hold so held work can continue.
issue.treeControl.cancelSubtreeHelp: Cancel non-terminal tasks in this subtree and stop queued/running work where possible.
issue.treeControl.restoreSubtreeHelp: Restore tasks cancelled by this subtree operation so work can resume.
issue.treeControl.pauseWorkHelp: Pause active execution on this task until an explicit resume.
issue.treeControl.resumeWorkHelp: Release the active pause hold so this task can continue.
issue.treeControl.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this subtree control is being applied...
issue.treeControl.noAgentsToWake: No assigned agents are eligible to wake from this preview.
issue.treeControl.wakeAgentsAfter: Wake assigned agents after this operation completes.
issue.treeControl.cancelWarning: Cancelling a subtree is destructive. Non-terminal tasks will be marked cancelled, and running or queued work will be interrupted where possible.
issue.treeControl.confirmCancel: I understand this will cancel {{count}} tasks.
issue.treeControl.taskExecutionHeld: Task execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake the assignee for triage.

issue.treeControl.pausedByAncestor: This task is paused by ancestor

issue.treeControl.subtreeActionInvalid: This subtree action is currently invalid for the selected tasks.

routine.subtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution tasks.
routine.noActiveRoutines: No active routines. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
routine.composer.advancedDeliveryDescrip: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
routine.composer.footerDescription: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.
routine.policies.coalesceIfActive: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
routine.policies.alwaysEnqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
routine.policies.skipIfActive: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.
routine.policies.skipMissed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
routine.policies.enqueueMissedWithCap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
routine.toasts.createdWithAgent: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
routine.toasts.createdDraft: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.
routine.toasts.couldNotUpdate: Paperclip could not update the routine.
routine.toasts.couldNotStartRun: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
routine.toasts.setDefaultAgent: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.
routine.toasts.couldNotSave: Paperclip could not save the routine.
routine.toasts.conflictBody: Someone else updated this routine. Reload to see the latest revision.
routine.toasts.couldNotCreateTrigger: Paperclip could not create the trigger.
routine.toasts.triggerSavedBody: The routine cadence update was saved.
routine.toasts.couldNotUpdateTrigger: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
routine.toasts.couldNotDeleteTrigger: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
routine.toasts.couldNotRotateSecret: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
routine.toasts.couldNotRestore: Paperclip could not restore the revision.
routine.toasts.restoredWithSecrets: Trigger enabled state was restored from the snapshot. New webhook secrets are available in the banner above.
routine.toasts.restoredWithoutSecrets: Trigger enabled state was restored from the snapshot.
routine.history.noEditsDescription: Revision 1 is the only history this routine has. Saving an edit creates the first additional revision.
routine.history.restoreDescription: Restoring this revision creates a new revision {{number}} with the same content. History stays append-only.
routine.history.unsavedEditsDescription: You changed {{fields}} but haven't saved yet. Save or discard before previewing or restoring an older revision.
routine.history.webhookSecretsNote: Webhook secrets are not stored in revisions. If a restored webhook trigger needs re-creation, Paperclip mints fresh secret material at restore time.
routine.history.restoreRevisionDescripti: This creates a new revision {{newNumber}} with the same content as revision {{targetNumber}}. Revisions {{from}}–{{to}} stay in history and are not modified.
routine.history.fieldsRevert: Routine field values, variables, and schedule cron will revert.
routine.history.webhookRecreated: The webhook trigger {{label}} will be recreated with a new URL and secret. Paperclip will show the secret once after restore — copy it before closing.
routine.history.changeSummaryPlaceholder: Why are you restoring? Visible in history.
routine.dialog.runRoutineDescription: Choose the agent and optional project for this one run. Routine defaults are prefilled and won't be changed.
routine.dialog.defaultAgentRequired: Default agent required for this run.
routine.dialog.chooseWorkspaceBeforeRunn: Choose an existing workspace before running.
companySettings.attachmentSizeError: Enter a whole number from 1 to {{max}}.
companySettings.requireBoardApproval: Require board approval for new hires
companySettings.requireBoardApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
companySettings.noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
companySettings.archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
companySettings.membersFocusedNote: Core keeps this page focused on membership, invite approvals, and safe member removal.
companySettings.instanceAdminNote: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.
companySettings.humansDescription: Manage human company memberships and status here.
companySettings.pendingHumanJoinsDescrip: Review pending join requests before they become active company members.
companySettings.noUserMemberships: No user memberships found for this company yet.
companySettings.selectCompanyToManageAcc: Select a company to manage access.
companySettings.noPermissionToManageMemb: You do not have permission to manage company members.
companySettings.advancedPermissionsDescr: Advanced access, scoped assignment, and explicit grant controls are provided by installed company settings extensions.
companySettings.advancedPermissionsUnava: Core Paperclip keeps enforcing company boundaries and any existing restrictive policy data, but editing advanced permissions requires an installed extension.
companySettings.selectCompanyForEnvironm: Select a company context to manage environment secrets and bindings.
companySettings.enableEnvironmentsHint: Enable Environments in instance experimental settings to manage shared execution targets.
companySettings.environmentFormDescripti: Configure a reusable execution target for your agents.
companySettings.environmentNameHint: Operator-facing name for this execution target.
companySettings.environmentDescriptionHi: Optional note about what this machine is for.
companySettings.driverHint: Sandbox stores plugin-backed provider config on the shared environment seam. SSH stores a remote machine target.
companySettings.sshHostHint: DNS name or IP address for the remote machine.
companySettings.sshRemoteWorkspacePathHi: Absolute path that Paperclip will verify during SSH connection tests.
companySettings.sshPrivateKeyHint: Optional PEM private key. Leave blank to rely on the server's SSH agent or default keychain.
companySettings.sshKnownHostsHint: Optional known_hosts block used when strict host key checking is enabled.
companySettings.strictHostKeyCheckingHin: Keep this on unless you deliberately want probe-time host key acceptance disabled.
companySettings.sandboxProviderHint: Installed run-capable sandbox provider plugins appear here.
companySettings.noAdditionalConfigFields: This provider does not declare additional configuration fields.
companySettings.environmentVariablesHint: Injected into runs that resolve through this environment. Use plain values or company secrets.
companySettings.defaultEnvironmentUpdate: Agent inheritance now follows the updated instance default.
companySettings.invitesDescription: Invite people to request access to this company. New invite links are copied to your clipboard when they are generated.
companySettings.inviteAPersonDescription: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
companySettings.roleViewerDescription: Can view company work and follow along.
companySettings.roleOperatorDescription: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.
companySettings.roleAdminDescription: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
companySettings.roleAdminGets: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.
companySettings.roleOwnerDescription: Full company access, including membership management.
companySettings.roleOwnerGets: Everything in Admin, plus managing members.
companySettings.inviteSingleUseNote: Each invite link is single-use. Human invitees get the selected role immediately after sign-in; agent invites still create a join request for approval.
companySettings.inviteHistoryAudit: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.
companySettings.thisUrlIncludesDomain: This URL includes the current Paperclip domain returned by the server.
companySettings.inviteHistoryDescription: Review invite status, audience, inviter, and any linked join request.
companySettings.noInvitesYet: No invites have been created for this company yet.
companySettings.selectCompanyToManageInv: Select a company to manage invites.
companySettings.noPermissionToManageInvi: You do not have permission to manage company invites.
companySettings.inviteCreatedCopied: Invite ready below and copied to clipboard.
companySettings.clipboardUnavailableCopy: The invite URL is selected. Copy it manually from the field.
companySettings.copyInviteUrlManually: Copy the invite URL manually from the field below.
companySettings.selectFileToPreview: Select a file to preview its contents.
companySettings.binaryAssetPreview: Binary asset preview is not available for this file type.
companySettings.importSourceDescription: Choose a GitHub repo or upload a local Paperclip zip package.
companySettings.localZipHelpText: Upload a .zip exported directly from Paperclip. Re-zipped archives created by Finder, Explorer, or other zip tools may not import correctly.
companySettings.githubUrlHint: Repo tree path or blob URL to COMPANY.md (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/tree/main/company).
companySettings.targetHint: Import into this company or create a new one.
companySettings.newCompanyNameHint: Optional override. Leave blank to use the package name.
companySettings.collisionStrategyHint: Board imports can rename, skip, or replace matching company content.
companySettings.selectCompanyToImport: Select a company to import into.
companySettings.packagesMoved: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the Org Chart header.
secrets.dialog.updateExternalDesc: Creates a new Paperclip metadata version that points at an existing provider secret. Paperclip does not write a new provider value.
secrets.dialog.updateValueDesc: Creates a new provider-backed version. Consumers pinned to latest pick up the new value on the next run.
secrets.dialog.vaultDescription: Save only non-sensitive routing metadata. Credentials stay in the runtime environment or provider identity.
secrets.dialog.removeVaultAwsNote: This does not delete the remote AWS Secrets Manager vault, secrets, or any AWS data.
secrets.dialog.removeVaultGenericNote: This does not delete any remote provider data.
secrets.dialog.removeVaultImpact: Secrets using this vault will lose the vault association until you assign another one.
secrets.info.howToUseResolve: Paperclip resolves the value server-side when the run starts and injects it as that env var. Project env applies to every task in the project and overrides agent env on matching keys.
secrets.managed.managedExplanation: Paperclip-managed secrets are created in the selected provider and future rotations write a new provider version through Paperclip.
secrets.form.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this secret used for? (no values)
secrets.form.externalRefHelp: Existing provider secrets are resolve-only in Paperclip. Rotate the value in the provider, then update this reference only if the path, ARN, or version changes.
secrets.form.rotateRefHelp: Rotate the actual value in the provider before changing this Paperclip reference.
secrets.form.defaultVaultHelp: Rotating with the deployment default preserves current fallback behavior.
secrets.form.deploymentHelp: Existing deployment-level provider settings stay available for backwards compatibility.
secrets.form.backupReminder: I understand backup and restore require both the database metadata and the local encrypted master key file.
secrets.form.comingSoonNotice: This provider can save draft routing metadata, but runtime writes and resolution stay disabled until the provider module is implemented and reviewed.
secrets.vaultCard.configureAwsVault: Configure an AWS provider vault to enable remote import
secrets.awsDiscovery.enterRegion: Enter an AWS region before discovery.
secrets.awsDiscovery.noStablePrefix: No stable namespace or prefix detected
plugin.uninstallDialog.description: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
plugin.errorDialog.noErrorMessage: Plugin entered an error state without a stored error message.
plugin.localFolders.savedWithWarning: Local folder saved, but validation still needs attention.
myIssues.selectCompany: Select a company to view your tasks.
newAgent.optionalSkillsDescription: Optional skills from the company library. Built-in Paperclip runtime skills are added automatically.
newAgent.noOptionalSkills: No optional company skills installed yet.
boardClaim.claimedDescription: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.
boardClaim.signInDescription: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.
boardClaim.claimDescription: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.
companies.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete this company and all its data? This cannot be undone.
devRestartBanner.reasonBackendAndMigrati: backend files changed and migrations are pending
devRestartBanner.reasonPendingMigrations: pending migrations need a fresh boot
devRestartBanner.reasonBackendChanges: backend files changed since this server booted
devRestartBanner.autoRestartIdle: Auto-restart will trigger when the instance is idle
devRestartBanner.restartManual: Restart pnpm dev:once after the active work is safe to interrupt
cloudAccessGate.noCompanyAccessDescripti: This account is signed in, but it does not have an active company membership or instance-admin access on this Paperclip instance.
cloudAccessGate.useCompanyInvite: Use a company invite or sign in with an account that already belongs to this org.
bootstrapPending.preferHost: Prefer to finish setup from the host?
bootstrapPending.inviteAlreadyActive: A bootstrap invite is already active. Check your Paperclip startup logs for the first-admin URL, or run this command on the host to rotate it:
bootstrapPending.runCommandOnHost: Run this command on the host that runs Paperclip to print a one-time first-admin invite URL:
bootstrapPending.alreadyClaimed: Someone else has already claimed this instance.
bootstrapPending.refreshOrAskAdmin: Refresh to sign in, or ask the existing admin to invite you from Instance settings -> Access.
bootstrapPending.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to claim this instance.
bootstrapPending.serverUnreachable: We couldn’t reach the server. Try again in a moment.
bootstrapPending.waitingForAdmin: This Paperclip is waiting on its first admin
bootstrapPending.inviteOnlyMode: This instance runs in invite-only mode. The operator must generate a one-time first-admin invite URL from the host. Once you have the link, open it from this browser to finish setup.
bootstrapPending.browserClaimDisabled: Browser-based claim is intentionally disabled in public mode so anyone on the network can’t promote themselves.
bootstrapPending.noAdminYet: No admin has claimed this instance yet. Sign in or create your Paperclip account to become the first admin from this browser.
bootstrapPending.claimPrompt: No admin has claimed this instance yet. Claim it now to become the first admin and start onboarding.
envVarEditor.createSecretFromPlain: Create secret from current plain value
envVarEditor.storeAsSecret: Store value as secret and replace with reference
envVarEditor.runsWillFail: Runs will fail until you remap or re-enable.
fileTree.filesWillAppear: Files will appear here when they are available.
fileViewer.viewerBlockedBody: This file is not available through the viewer because it may contain sensitive data.
fileViewer.pathOutsideWorkspaceBody: The viewer can only open files that live under the issue’s workspace.
fileViewer.workspaceUnavailableBody: The isolated worktree for this issue has been cleaned up, so files cannot be previewed.
fileViewer.remoteNotSupportedBody: This workspace is hosted remotely and is not available for inline preview yet.
fileViewer.fileTooLarge: File is too large to preview
fileViewer.fileTooLargeBody: This file exceeds the supported preview size.
fileViewer.previewNotSupported: Preview not supported for this file type
fileViewer.previewNotSupportedBody: This file does not have a text, image, or video preview available.
fileViewer.cantPreviewBody: The viewer was unable to load this file.
fileViewer.browseDescription: Search and preview files from this issue’s workspace.
fileViewer.copyLink: Copy link to this file view
fileViewer.fileNotFoundBody: That file was not found in the active workspace.
fileViewer.noWorkspaceAvailableBody: This issue does not have a workspace that supports preview yet.
fileViewer.remotePreviewComingSoonBody: This workspace is hosted remotely; inline previews are not supported yet.
auth.signInDescription: Use your email and password to access this instance.
auth.signUpDescription: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
auth.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
cliAuth.approvedDescription: The Paperclip CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.
cliAuth.startAgain: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.
cliAuth.signInDescription: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to approve the CLI access request.
cliAuth.approveDescription: A local Paperclip CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.
cliAuth.updateFailed: Failed to update CLI auth challenge
cliAuth.requiresAdmin: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.
org.selectCompany: Select a company to view org chart.
org.noAgents: No agents in the organization. Create agents to build your org chart.
orgChart.selectCompany: Select a company to view the org chart.
inviteLanding.awaitingApproval: Your request is still awaiting approval. {{approver}} must approve your request to join.
inviteLanding.refreshAfterApproved: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.
inviteLanding.inviteNotAvailableDesc: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
inviteLanding.joinRequestNotApproved: This join request was not approved.
inviteLanding.inviteAlreadyUsed: This invite has already been used.
inviteLanding.invitedToJoin: You've been invited to join Paperclip
inviteLanding.reviewAgentDetails: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.
inviteLanding.createAccountFirst: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
inviteLanding.accountReady: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.
inviteLanding.submitAgentDetailsDesc: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in {{company}}.
inviteLanding.signInDesc: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite. If you do not have one yet, switch back to create account.
inviteLanding.pleaseFillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
inviteLanding.alreadySignedUp: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
inviteLanding.noAccountYet: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.
inviteLanding.willFinishSetup: This will finish setting up Paperclip.
inviteLanding.willGrantAccess: This will grant or complete your access to {{company}}.
inviteLanding.checkingAccessRetry: Checking your company access. Try again in a moment.
inviteLanding.accountAlreadyBelongs: This account already belongs to the company.
teamCatalog.selectCompany: Select a company to browse the team catalog.
teamCatalog.selectTeam: Select a team to view details.
teamCatalog.teamImportedDescription: {{name}} was imported into your company. Imported entities are stamped with catalog provenance.
teamCatalog.partialStateNotRolledBack: Partial state is not rolled back. Review the company activity log before retrying.
teamCatalog.targetManagerHelp: This team's root agents need a manager in your company. Pick the agent who will become their parent. Internal team hierarchy is preserved.
teamCatalog.fullCompanyPackage: Use this team as a full-company package (no target manager)
teamCatalog.allowExternalSourcesDesc: Resolve github/url skill and team sources at install time.
teamCatalog.allowUnpinnedOptionalSources: Permit optional sources that are not pinned to a ref or checksum.
teamCatalog.allowLocalPathSourcesDesc: Required for local_path / agent_package sources. Development use only.
teamCatalog.localPathSourcesWarning: This team has local-path sources. Enable "Allow local-path sources" to continue, or install it from the CLI.
teamCatalog.skillPlanHelp: Before agents are imported, the catalog resolves the skills they depend on. This is the resolution plan.
teamCatalog.eachAgentDefaults: Each imported agent defaults to its package adapter; override here before install. Deeper per-adapter model config is editable on the agent after install.
teamCatalog.resolvingSkills: Resolving skills, importing agents, projects, and routines. This may take a moment.
userProfile.selectCompany: Select a company to view user profiles.
userProfile.notFound: User profile not found for this company.
userProfile.noDirectActions: No direct user actions recorded yet.
onboarding.step3DescPrefix: Name your lead. They'll help drive
onboarding.step3DescMiddle: toward its mission. We default to
onboarding.step3DescSuffix: — rename it to anything you like.
onboarding.step4Desc: Pick the adapter and model your lead will run on, then check the environment.
onboarding.step5Desc: Everything's set up — your team lead is online and ready to work.
onboarding.capsuleSlot: an empty slot for an agent
onboarding.capsuleOnline: is online and ready to work!
onboarding.growDesc: We'll use this to set up your lead agent and plan which agents to add.
onboarding.growWorkLabel: What does your team work on?
onboarding.growWorkPlaceholder: e.g. We create educational YouTube content about AI
onboarding.growWorkflowsPlaceholder: e.g. Manual content creation, spreadsheet tracking, email outreach
onboarding.growPainLabel: What pain points would you solve with AI?
onboarding.growPainPlaceholder: e.g. Can't produce content fast enough, no time for social media
onboarding.growAutomatePlaceholder: e.g. Social media scheduling and content repurposing
onboarding.growGeneratedMission: Generated mission — edit however you like:
onboarding.step1Desc: What should we call your team?
onboarding.step2DescPrefix: Your mission guides everything — your lead agent, who you bring on, and the work
onboarding.missionPathLabel: How would you like to define your mission?
onboarding.missionPlaceholder: What is your team trying to achieve?
onboarding.qWorkLabel: What does your team work on?
onboarding.qWorkPlaceholder: e.g. We create educational YouTube content about AI
onboarding.qServePlaceholder: e.g. Non-technical professionals curious about AI tools
onboarding.qBottleneckLabel: What's your biggest bottleneck right now?
onboarding.qBottleneckPlaceholder: e.g. Can't produce content fast enough across multiple channels
onboarding.qSuccessLabel: What would success look like in 6 months?
onboarding.qSuccessPlaceholder: e.g. Publishing daily content across 4 platforms with a team of AI agents
onboarding.draftMission: Here's your draft mission — edit it however you like:
onboarding.missionChangeLater: You can always change your mission later in settings.
onboarding.envCheckDesc: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
onboarding.anthropicKeyHintSuffix: is set. You can clear it in this adapter config and retry the probe.
onboardingChat.reviewIt: Review it, make edits, then approve.
onboardingChat.welcomeMessage.greeting: Hi! Thanks for bringing me on to lead {{companyName}}.
onboardingChat.welcomeMessage.readyToPla: I'm ready to put together a plan for who we should bring on. Want me to get started?
onboardingClassic.step1.title: Name your company
onboardingClassic.step1.description: This is the organization your agents will work for.
onboardingClassic.step1.missionPlacehold: What is this company trying to achieve?
onboardingClassic.step2.title: Create your first agent
onboardingClassic.step2.description: Choose how this agent will run tasks.
onboardingClassic.step2.envCheck.title: Adapter environment check
onboardingClassic.step2.envCheck.descrip: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
onboardingClassic.step2.anthropicKey.sug: Claude failed while ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set. You can clear it in this CEO adapter config and retry the probe.
onboardingClassic.step2.authHints.setEnv: If auth fails, set {{key}} in env or run {{command}}.
onboardingClassic.step2.authHints.loginR: If login is required, run claude login and retry.
onboardingClassic.step3.title: Give it something to do
onboardingClassic.step3.description: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
onboardingClassic.step3.descriptionPlace: Add more detail about what the agent should do...
onboardingClassic.step4.title: Ready to launch
onboardingClassic.step4.description: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the task.
onboardingClassic.errors.createOrSelectC: Create or select a company before testing adapter environment.
onboardingClassic.errors.opencodeModelRe: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.
onboardingClassic.errors.retriedButStill: Retried with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset in adapter config, but the environment test is still failing.
onboardingClassic.errors.failedToUnsetKe: Failed to unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and retry.
joinRequests.selectCompany: Select a company to review join requests.
joinRequests.noPermission: You do not have permission to review join requests for this company.
joinRequests.description: Review human and agent join requests outside the mixed inbox feed. This queue uses the same approval mutations as the inline inbox cards.
